laws.title: Connecticut Minimum Wage —$16.94/hr (Effective January 1, 2026)
laws.summary: Connecticut's minimum wage increased to $16.94/hr on January 1, 2026, the highest in its history and second-highest among states (behind Washington at $17.13).
compliance_actions: Post updated Connecticut minimum wage notice
Review any employment agreements or offer letters
Review any employment agreements or offer letters referencing prior rates
